_meta.scope: Citation-grade future replacements for generated Soldier's Story representative rows.
_meta.note: No sourced named soldiers are imported yet. The records array must stay empty until a candidate pack passes tools/import-soldier-replacements.mjs and the browser probe. Template values below are documentation only and are ignored by the validator.

_template.name: <full sourced name>

sources.title: <source title>
sources.author: <author>
sources.locator: <page, roster line, OR volume, card number, or URL locator>

_template.sourceNote: <short rationale tying sources to identity, rank, unit, and ratings>
